Duration: Instantaneous

data.description:
You create an astral body for yourself and an invisible, solid, extradimensional body. The astral body is your true form while you are using this spell; the extraplanar body functions as a physical object and allows you to move through other planes of existence.

Any creature that touches or enters the extradimensional body takes 5d10 radiant damage, and the first time on each turn that a creature exits the extradimensional body from the plane of origin, it must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. The astral projection can move through any non-solid object as easily as gas; creatures in such a space are unaware of its passage.

Casting Time: 1 hour
Range: Up to 30 feet per level (D) Components: V, S, M (for each creature affected, a lock of hair from the target and an item worth at least 50 gp for each ring worn by the target)
A wooden or metal door, shutter, or similar object that you can see within range instantly becomes locked.

To determine whether you hit a target within range, make an attack roll.
